seo_data.generated_keywords: Ariete Stiromatic 6257, steam iron, steam generator, 2000W iron, aluminium soleplate, vertical steaming, cork handle, 800ml water tank, continuous steam, 3 bar pressure, garment care
seo_data.meta_description: Discover the Ariete Stiromatic 6257 steam iron with 2000W power, 800ml tank, aluminium soleplate, and vertical steaming for efficient garment care.
seo_data.seo_long_description:
The Ariete Stiromatic 6257 is a high-performance steam iron engineered to deliver professional ironing results at home. Boasting a powerful 2000W motor and an aluminium soleplate, this iron ensures rapid heating and effortless gliding over all fabric types. Its integrated steam generator, featuring a 660cc stainless steel boiler and 3 bar pressure, provides a consistent steam output of up to 80g/min, effectively smoothing out even the most challenging creases.

Designed for user comfort and convenience, the Stiromatic 6257 includes a professional cork handle for a secure grip and an 800ml water tank for extended ironing sessions. Practical features such as a single boiler/iron ignition button, thermostat control light, and steam ready indicator simplify operation. The iron also offers vertical steaming capabilities, making it versatile for refreshing hanging clothes. Safety is paramount, with an end of water warning light and a protective safety cap.

range_overview:
The Ariete Stiromatic 6257 is a robust steam iron designed for efficient and professional-grade garment care. It features a powerful 2000W heating element and an aluminium soleplate, ensuring quick heat-up and smooth gliding across various fabrics. The integrated steam generator, with a 660cc stainless steel boiler and 3 bar pressure, delivers a continuous steam rate of up to 80g/min, making it effective for tackling stubborn wrinkles.

This model is equipped with a substantial 800ml water tank, minimizing the need for frequent refills during longer ironing sessions. User convenience is enhanced by features such as a professional cork handle for comfortable grip, a single boiler/iron ignition button, and a thermostat control light. For added versatility, the Stiromatic 6257 supports vertical ironing, ideal for refreshing hanging garments and drapes. Safety is also a priority, with an end of water warning light and a safety cap included.
sales_arguments: Generous 800ml water tank for extended use without frequent refills.
Professional cork handle ensures comfortable and secure grip.
Equipped with continuous steam and vertical ironing for versatile garment care.
Safety features include a safety cap and end of water warning light.
